evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent v6 usage: createUploadthing, createRouteHandler, generateUploadButton/Dropzone, FileRouter type, image shorthand and MIME-key configs with maxFileSize/maxFileCount. Pins to v6 explicitly. No deprecated traps; consistent and version-claimed long-tail handling.
evidence.executability: Multiple fenced blocks but they are scattered across many files with ambiguous paths (e.g., ~/src vs src/utils), import path '~/app/api/uploadthing/core' assumes tsconfig path alias not configured. Test imports rely on internal `_def.routerConfig` private fields which likely won't exist. Mentions ngrok/Cloudflare Tunnels but as background, not required; not a sandbox blocker. Several non-obvious fixes required.
evidence.completeness: (a) API key acquisition described only in prose, no explicit dashboard URL/menu path; (b) install bash present; (c) env template present (.env.local); (d) backend File Router + route handler present; (e) frontend page + utils present; (f) test command via Vitest mentioned with script suggestion but no explicit single runnable test command block following a Test header. Some duplication between sections. Env vars mentioned consistently.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Uses bracketed numeric citations [5][9][25] etc. with no actual URLs to docs.uploadthing.com inlined; only generic mention of 'the docs'. No canonical official URLs cited as links near code. Effectively no official-docs URLs anchored.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; applied long-tail handling. Playbook is internally consistent and version-pinned (v6), warranting 4 on correctness. Citation anchoring suffers from numeric refs without URLs.
